proof_attempts:
intro S T h
  have h₁ : S.toQuadSols = T.toQuadSols := by simpa [solsInclQuadSols] using h
  have h₂ : S.toQuadSols.toLinSols = T.toQuadSols.toLinSols := by

  have h₃ : S.val = T.val := by
    simp_all [QuadSols.ext_iff, Sols.ext_iff, ACCSystemLinear.LinSols.ext_iff]
  -- Since S and T are solutions to the ACCs and their underlying charges are equal, they must be the same solution.

    apply Sols.ext
    <;> simp_all [Sols.ext_iff, QuadSols.ext_iff, ACCSystemLinear.LinSols.ext_iff]
